title: Fuel to XP
description: Convert fuel to experience with the Sculk Flower!
body:
# About
Adds a Sculk Flower block, which consumes thrown fuel within one block distance of itself, expelling experience orbs after a short digestion period.


![Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ff0b8573b55f6781b2f0898f9aa6dab1eec62d5b.png)
_(any small flower may be used)_

## Config

Configuration file can be found under `config/fuel_to_xp.cfg`. Default config:

```
fuelPerXp = 200
delayTicks = 20
```

## Requirements
- [Fabric Language Kotlin](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-language-kotlin)
- [Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api)
